metadata.name: Duplicate Campaign for a New Region

description: A successful campaign in the US needs to be duplicated and launched in Canada.

nodes.task_description: Locate and duplicate the original US campaign.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a copy of the entire campaign structure.

nodes.task_description: In the new campaign, change all location targeting from 'United States' to 'Canada'.
Review and adjust ad copy for any regional spelling or cultural differences (e.g., 'color' to 'colour').

expected_outcome.expected: Agent localizes the ad copy for the new market.

nodes.task_description: Activate the new campaign for Canada.

expected_outcome.expected: The localized campaign is now live.
